name: Feature implementation
about: Track one approved feature from implementation through verification

## Purpose

Describe the approved user scenario and business problem.

## Git Work

- Issue:
- Work branch:
- Base branch: `develop`
- Domain:
- Shared files affected:
- Pull Request:

## Approved Scope

- [ ] List only approved behavior
- [ ] Do not add behavior merely to complete this checklist

## Policy And Strategy

- [ ] Input validation
- [ ] Transaction boundary
- [ ] Idempotency
- [ ] Concurrency control
- [ ] Exception response
- [ ] Logging
- [ ] Metrics
- [ ] Not-applicable items include a reason

## Implementation

- [ ] Controller
- [ ] Service
- [ ] Repository
- [ ] Request and response
- [ ] Database migration
- [ ] API documentation
- [ ] Irrelevant layers are not created

## Verification Stages

- [ ] Stage 1: Agent runs automated tests on Linux
- [ ] Stage 2: User runs API tests with Postman on Windows
- [ ] Stage 3: User runs local frontend integration tests when a frontend exists
- [ ] Stage 4: Docker environment integration test

## Verification Results

- Automated tests:
- Postman:
- Local frontend:
- Docker:
- Logs or metrics checked:

## Not Completed

- Item:
- Reason:
- Remaining risk:
